what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links the design-source channel to an image asset located at image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-46.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to recent-pitches/p-46
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with microsecond precision and UTC offset
No code symbols or executable content
standouts: The target URI uses a custom image:// scheme with a semantic path (recent-pitches/p-46)
The file is purely metadata with no embedded image or description
conventions: Attachment id uses an 'att-' prefix with a hash
Channel-memory schema with channel, attachment_type, and target fields
concerns: The image target lacks a filename, extension, or MIME type
No alt text, dimensions, or checksum for the image
No explicit link to a specific message or pitch record beyond the channel
notes: A metadata stub that attaches a design-source pitch image to its channel for retrieval and provenance.
questions: What specific message or pitch record does p-46 correspond to?
How is the image:// URI resolved to an actual file or storage object?
Should there be an alt text, caption, or image dimensions field?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it records an image attachment for the design-source channel.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, timestamped association between a design-source channel item and its corresponding image/pitch asset.
contribution: Provides a persistent, idempotent attachment record that maps a channel to an image asset, supporting retrieval and audit of design-source pitch imagery.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that links the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-46 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image asset belongs to a design-source channel message or pitch for later retrieval and provenance tracking.
